name: Sword Slash
description: Deals melee damage to one adjacent enemy.

name: Qi Step
description: Temporarily increases movement range before moving.

name: Inner Guard
description: Reduces incoming damage for one enemy turn.

name: Crescent Cut
description: Damages all enemies in adjacent cells around the player.

name: Piercing Thrust
description: Deals melee damage to one enemy and partially ignores defence.

name: Flowing Counter
description: Enter a counter stance. If attacked next enemy turn, counterattack once.

name: Shadow Step
description: Dash to a nearby empty cell, ignoring enemies and obstacles on the path.

name: Dragon Palm
description: Deals ranged qi damage to one enemy within 3 cells.

name: Golden Bell
description: Completely blocks the next damage taken.

name: Iron Sand Palm
description: Deals melee damage and pushes the target back one cell.

name: Soul Seizing
description: Makes the target's next attack hit one of its team mates.
